requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety and Protection Civile Requirements for BESS Installations in Algeria
requirement_topic.zh: 阿尔及利亚BESS安装的消防安全与民事保护要求
requirement_topic.zht: 阿爾及利亞BESS安裝的消防安全與民事保護要求

summary.en: Fire safety for BESS installations in Algeria is administered by the Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC) under the Algerian Ministry of Interior. The Protection Civile enforces fire-protection regulations for industrial, energy, and utility installations, and installation permits for large-scale energy facilities are subject to fire-safety review and approval. BESS installations at utility scale are treated as industrial hazard installations and must comply with fire-safety design requirements covering thermal-runaway mitigation to IEC 62619, gas detection and ventilation, battery containment and separation distances, fire-suppression system design, emergency shutdown, and evacuation procedures. Under Algeria's growing Solar 1000 and Solar 3000–4000 MW programmes, energy-storage projects connected to the national grid or co-located with solar plants are expected to satisfy IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 thermal-runaway and fire-propagation requirements as a condition of project authorisation and international project-finance lender acceptance. Insurer requirements for Algerian infrastructure projects typically follow IEC standards for fire-safety evidence.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚BESS安装消防安全由内政部下属的民事保护总局（DGPC）管理，负责执行工业、能源和公用事业装置的消防规范，大型能源设施的安装许可须经消防安全审查和审批。公用事业规模BESS装置被视为工业危险装置，须满足消防安全设计要求，涵盖符合IEC 62619的热失控防控、气体探测和通风、电池隔离与间距、消防系统设计、紧急停机和疏散程序。在阿尔及利亚持续推进的Solar 1000及Solar 3000–4000 MW项目框架下，接入国家电网或与光伏电站配套的储能项目须满足IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2热失控与火灾蔓延要求，作为项目授权和国际项目融资贷款方接受的条件。阿尔及利亚基础设施项目的保险方通常要求提供符合IEC标准的消防安全证据。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞BESS安裝消防安全由內政部下屬的民事保護總局（DGPC）管理，負責執行工業、能源和公用事業裝置的消防規範，大型能源設施的安裝許可須經消防安全審查和審批。公用事業規模BESS裝置被視為工業危險裝置，須滿足消防安全設計要求，涵蓋符合IEC 62619的熱失控防控、氣體探測和通風、電池隔離與間距、消防系統設計、緊急停機和疏散程序。在阿爾及利亞持續推進的Solar 1000及Solar 3000–4000 MW項目框架下，接入國家電網或與光伏電站配套的儲能項目須滿足IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2熱失控與火災蔓延要求，作為項目授權和國際項目融資貸款方接受的條件。阿爾及利亞基礎設施項目的保險方通常要求提供符合IEC標準的消防安全證據。

standards_or_laws: Algerian regulations administered by the Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC)
IEC 62619:2022 (safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries — thermal-runaway requirements for BESS)
IEC 62933-5-2 (safety requirements for grid-integrated lithium-ion energy storage systems — fire propagation)
Algeria Solar 1000 / Solar 3000–4000 MW programme project specifications (where applicable)
Project-specific fire-safety design and Protection Civile authority review

summary.en: China stationary BESS fire safety relies on GB 44240-2024 (general safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems), GB/T 36276-2023, and project fire-safety review under national fire-protection standards (GB 50016, GB 50819). These Chinese fire-safety frameworks address similar concerns — thermal runaway, gas detection, suppression, separation — but are not directly accepted by Algerian Protection Civile authorities, project owners, international lenders, or insurers as Algerian fire-safety approval.
summary.zh: 中国固定式BESS消防安全以GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统通用安全要求）、GB/T 36276-2023及国家消防标准（GB 50016、GB 50819）下的项目消防审查为依据。这些中国消防安全框架涵盖类似关切——热失控、气体探测、抑制、间距——但不被阿尔及利亚民事保护部门、项目业主、国际贷款方或保险方直接接受为阿尔及利亚消防安全审批。
summary.zht: 中國固定式BESS消防安全以GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統通用安全要求）、GB/T 36276-2023及國家消防標準（GB 50016、GB 50819）下的項目消防審查為依據。這些中國消防安全框架涵蓋類似關切——熱失控、氣體探測、抑制、間距——但不被阿爾及利亞民事保護部門、項目業主、國際貸款方或保險方直接接受為阿爾及利亞消防安全審批。

standards_or_laws: GB 50016 (Code for fire protection design of buildings)
GB 50819 (Code for fire protection design of photovoltaic power stations)

gap.en: Prepare a fire-safety design package for the Algeria project covering: thermal-runaway propagation test evidence to IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2, gas and smoke detection specification, battery containment and separation distances, suppression system type and agent selection, ventilation design, emergency shutdown logic, spill containment, and emergency response procedures in French and Arabic for review by the Algerian Protection Civile authority and project insurer. Chinese GB test data may support technical discussions but must be supplemented with IEC-route evidence accepted by international lenders and the Algerian project authority.
gap.zh: 应为阿尔及利亚项目准备消防安全设计文件包，涵盖：IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2热失控蔓延测试证据、气体和烟雾探测规格、电池隔离与间距、消防系统类型和灭火剂选择、通风设计、紧急停机逻辑、溢漏控制，以及供阿尔及利亚民事保护部门和项目保险方审查的法语和阿拉伯语应急程序。中国GB测试数据可用于技术讨论，但须以国际贷款方和阿尔及利亚项目主管部门认可的IEC路径证据补充。
gap.zht: 應為阿爾及利亞項目準備消防安全設計文件包，涵蓋：IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2熱失控蔓延測試證據、氣體和煙霧探測規格、電池隔離與間距、消防系統類型和滅火劑選擇、通風設計、緊急停機邏輯、溢漏控制，以及供阿爾及利亞民事保護部門和項目保險方審查的法語和阿拉伯語應急程序。中國GB測試數據可用於技術討論，但須以國際貸款方和阿爾及利亞項目主管部門認可的IEC路徑證據補充。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for installation approval by the Algerian Protection Civile authority (DGPC); IEC 62619 thermal-runaway evidence is de facto mandatory for international project-finance and insurer acceptance under Algeria's Solar programmes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese project fire-safety review (GB 44240-2024, GB 50016); Chinese approvals are not transferable to Algeria

source.publisher: Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC), Algeria / Ministère de l'Intérieur

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese fire-safety documentation (GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023) is not accepted as Algerian Protection Civile or project fire-safety approval. Prepare an IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2 fire-safety package in French and Arabic and engage the Algerian Protection Civile and project insurer before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国消防安全文件（GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023）不被阿尔及利亚民事保护部门或项目消防安全审批接受。调试前应准备法语和阿拉伯语版IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2消防安全文件包，并与阿尔及利亚民事保护部门和项目保险方沟通。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國消防安全文件（GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023）不被阿爾及利亞民事保護部門或項目消防安全審批接受。調試前應準備法語和阿拉伯語版IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2消防安全文件包，並與阿爾及利亞民事保護部門和項目保險方溝通。
